patterns.trigger: A local spacing improvement causes downstream macro layout drift.
patterns.law: Do not alter macro section spacing outside a declared section-position law.

patterns.trigger: Desktop closure passes but footer, CTA, authority meta, or evidence strings overflow on mobile.
patterns.law: Require a mobile overflow falsification pass before canonical promotion.

patterns.trigger: A generic product page starts inheriting flagship-only class tokens or editorial framing.
patterns.law: Keep IMC exceptions explicit and non-inheritable in family law.

patterns.trigger: A lane cannot run build or parser verification because repo-local dependencies are absent.
patterns.law: Treat lane-local dependency closure as required before autonomous verification.
patterns.evidence: Homepage-fidelity and product-family-kernel dependency closure on 2026-04-03

patterns.trigger: A verifier treats generic product pages like IMC-style fixed vertical screenshots and reports false regressions.
patterns.law: Verify generic product pages by anchored hero geometry plus section-flow groups, not by flagship absolute Y positions.

patterns.trigger: Path-like metric values overflow metric cards and create avoidable responsive regressions.
patterns.law: Compact path-like metric values before display and allow hard wrapping as a safety backstop.
